---
title: "Home"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="masthead">
  <span>Electoral Atlas · Spanish Second Republic · 1931–1936</span>
  <div class="lang-switcher">
    <a href="../en/" class="lang-btn active">EN</a>
    <a href="../es/" class="lang-btn">ES</a>
    <a href="../ca/" class="lang-btn">CA</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-flag-stripe"></div>
  <div class="hero-year">Spanish Second Republic · 1931–1939</div>
  <h1 class="hero-title">Electoral Atlas of the<br><em>Second Republic</em></h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">Municipal election results, 1931 · 1933 · 1936</p>
  <div class="hero-divider"></div>
  <div class="hero-meta">
    <div class="hero-meta-item">
      <span class="hero-meta-label">Elections</span>
      <span class="hero-meta-value">3</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-meta-item">
      <span class="hero-meta-label">Municipalities</span>
      <span class="hero-meta-value">~9,000</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-meta-item">
      <span class="hero-meta-label">Years covered</span>
      <span class="hero-meta-value">1931–36</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LOGO BAR -->
<div class="logo-bar">
  <div class="logo-bar-item">
    <img src="images/upf-logo.png" class="logo-img" alt="UPF">
  </div>
  <div class="logo-bar-divider"></div>
  <div class="logo-bar-item">
    <span class="logo-funding">Project PID2023-152743NB-I00 funded by:</span>
    <img src="images/ministerio-logo.png" class="logo-img" alt="Ministerio de Ciencia">
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT SECTION -->
<section class="content-section">
  <div class="section-label">About this project</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Mapping democracy at the<br>municipal level</h2>
  <p class="section-body">
    This atlas presents the results of the three general elections held during the Spanish
    Second Republic (1931–1939) at the municipality level. By mapping electoral geography
    across all of Spain, it reveals the territorial patterns of political support — and the
    profound divisions that shaped the Republic's fate.
  </p>
  <p class="section-body">
    The data covers over 9,000 municipalities across the three elections of April 1931,
    November 1933, and February 1936, allowing comparison of political shifts across
    regions, coalitions, and time.
  </p>

  <div class="election-cards">
    <div class="election-card">
      <div class="card-year">1931</div>
      <div class="card-name">Republican–Socialist Coalition</div>
      <p class="card-desc">The founding election. A landslide for republican and socialist forces brought an end to the monarchy and established the Second Republic.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="election-card">
      <div class="card-year">1933</div>
      <div class="card-name">Right-wing victory</div>
      <p class="card-desc">The first election with women's suffrage. A divided left allowed the CEDA and the Radicals to form a centre-right government.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="election-card">
      <div class="card-year">1936</div>
      <div class="card-name">Popular Front</div>
      <p class="card-desc">The left reunited under the Popular Front narrowly defeated the National Front. The result was disputed and preceded the Civil War.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-label mt-lg">Project details</div>
  <div class="info-grid">
    <div class="info-item">
      <div class="info-item-label">Data sources</div>
      <div class="info-item-value">Historical electoral records, INE, regional archives</div>
    </div>
    <div class="info-item">
      <div class="info-item-label">Geography</div>
      <div class="info-item-value">Historical municipal boundaries, 1930s</div>
    </div>
    <div class="info-item">
      <div class="info-item-label">Mapping tool</div>
      <div class="info-item-value">Maplibre GL JS</div>
    </div>
    <div class="info-item">
      <div class="info-item-label">Built with</div>
      <div class="info-item-value">R · Quarto · GitHub Pages</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>Electoral Atlas of the Spanish Second Republic &nbsp;·&nbsp; Universitat Pompeu Fabra &nbsp;·&nbsp; Data for research purposes &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2025</p>
</footer>
```
